name: Abrade
oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.
• Destroy target artifact.
flavor_text:
"What do you mean a walking clock destroyed all our cannons?!"
—Captain Lannery Storm

name: Arcane Signet
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text: The dark nights of Valley hold no horrors for batfolk clerics and warriors.

name: Big Score
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards and create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
flavor_text: "Unimaginable riches? I assure you, I have a *vivid* imagination."

name: Bojuka Bog
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, exile target player's graveyard.
{T}: Add {B}.

name: Broken Wings
oracle_text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.
flavor_text:
"Fynn climbed the highest peak and waited, still and silent, until the falling snow had hidden him entirely. When the great eagle flew past, the hunter's aim was true."
—Saga of the Wisdom Seeker

name: Coiling Oracle
oracle_text: When this creature enters, reveal the top card of your library. If it's a land card, put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, put that card into your hand.
flavor_text: Snaking remnants of nature directed by a body of thought and progress, the oracles embody all that is Simic.

name: Command Tower
oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
flavor_text: Deep in the forests of Valley, there is an ancient batfolk tower with mysterious runes etched into its structure.

name: Cultivate
oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.
flavor_text: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

name: Evolving Wilds
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text:
"The wilds are unpredictable. Rivers change course, trees shuffle and bend, rocks split and scurry. But mark my words, traveler—the main thing that'll change out there is *you*."
—Sturwynn, Boundary Lands ranger

name: Explore
oracle_text:
You may play an additional land this turn.
Draw a card.
flavor_text: As he crested the final peak, Nidd gasped at the beauty laid out before him. Finally, he had found a place to rest his weary legs. A place to call home.

name: Forgotten Cave
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {R}.
Cycling {R} ({R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

name: Gruul Turf
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.
{T}: Add {R}{G}.

name: Haunted Mire
oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)
This land enters tapped.
flavor_text: Some of the nature spirits and wraiths that haunt Urborg take offense at the term "ghost town."

name: Inspiring Overseer
oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
flavor_text:
"This city could certainly use a bit more divine intervention."
—Inspector Jillard

name: Jungle Hollow
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {B} or {G}.
flavor_text: On the surface of Ixalan's vast tar pits, Phyrexian oil glistened, and old bones began to stir.

name: Nested Shambler
oracle_text: When this creature dies, create X tapped 1/1 green Squirrel creature tokens, where X is this creature's power.
flavor_text: Home is where the heart was.

name: Ornithopter of Paradise
oracle_text:
Flying
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
flavor_text:
"Through even our darkest days, we must never cease creating. Each new invention brings value to the world, be it beauty, utility, or both."
—Rashmi, aether-seer

name: Path of Ancestry
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

name: Rampant Growth
oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text: Nature grows solutions to its problems.

name: Riot Control
oracle_text: You gain 1 life for each creature your opponents control. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you this turn.
flavor_text:
"Ravnicans need order. If they don't have it, we shall bring it to them."
—Isperia

name: Sakura-Tribe Elder
oracle_text: Sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text: He'd chosen a sunlit clearing with open skies and an ample brook. All that remained was to find a worthy sapling.

name: Spirited Companion
oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card.
flavor_text: She formed a friendship with several playful spirits, and soon "the pack" was known as the source of much mischief in Eiganjo.

name: Spore Frog
oracle_text: Sacrifice this creature: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.
flavor_text: A progenitor of tadpoles and allergies in equal measure.

name: Terramorphic Expanse
oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
flavor_text: The Conflux crashed together far-flung continents, like ships colliding in a storm.

name: Thought Vessel
oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
flavor_text: Infinite possibilities contained in a finite space.

name: Thriving Bluff
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than red.
{T}: Add {R} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: As eons passed, the rock wore away, revealing the rich colors at the mountain's heart.

name: Thriving Grove
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than green.
{T}: Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: Far from human eyes, birds flit between vivid blossoms in a hidden paradise.

name: Thriving Heath
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than white.
{T}: Add {W} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: Wildflowers here bloom not with the season but with the ebb and flow of magic.

name: Thriving Isle
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color other than blue.
{T}: Add {U} or one mana of the chosen color.
flavor_text: All the wonders of the natural world in one breathtaking microcosm.

This land enters tapped.

({T}: Add {R} or {G}.)
